pkgmetadata.longdescription: frugy is a tool for generating IPMI FRU binary data from YAML configuration files. It supports Board Info, Product Info, Chassis Info, Internal Use Area, and Multirecord Area including OEM records.
frugy 是一个从 YAML 配置文件生成 IPMI FRU 二进制数据的工具。支持 Board Info、Product Info、Chassis Info、Internal Use Area 和 Multirecord Area，包括 OEM 记录。
